title: Never Steal Anything Small
writer: Maxwell Anderson, Charles Lederer, Rouben Mamoulian
actors: James Cagney, Shirley Jones, Roger Smith
plot: Jake MacIllaney will do just about anything to win the presidential election of longshoreman union Local 26. When he encounters young upright attorney Dan Cabot and Cabot's attractive wife, Linda, MacIllaney breaks up their marria...
